title: Ender's Amazing Optimizations
description: Ultra optimized minecraft without destroying playability. Very little RAM required. 0 QoL. FAST.
body:
![Header](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/915/577/bh_ao_title.png)
**Only Needs 2GB of Ram!**
![About](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/915/576/bh_ao_overview.png)
One of the top performance packs out of the box! Boasting lightning fast loading times and incredible performance without sacrificing looks or functionality. (I know of one pack that performs better but only does so by sacrificing major Vanilla functionality.) So if you're looking for an optimization pack that doesn't change Minecraft's mechanics this is the answer!
[![Discord](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/915/575/bh_ao_community.png)](https://discord.gg/eWWnDRM3Cv)
Check out the [discord](https://discord.gg/eWWnDRM3Cv) For community support, questions and people to chat with!
